## .NET 8 WEB API Guidelines

1. Use Clean Architecture principles.

2. Use SOLID principles

3. Use Dependency Injection.

4. Use immutable record DTOs.

5. Use Minimal APIs wherever applicable.

6. Use Result pattern.

7. Use FluentValidation.

8. Prefer constructor injection.

9. One class one responsibility.

10. Unit test business logic.

11. Never duplicate mapping logic.

12. Use async everywhere.

13. Return ProblemDetails for errors.
